news.title:
Vedanta and AHEL lead FY27 demergers to unlock investor value.
Other firms like Thomas Cook, Natco Pharma, and REL also plan demergers.
news.summary:
Vedanta and AHEL lead FY27 demergers to unlock investor value.
Other firms like Thomas Cook, Natco Pharma, and REL also plan demergers.

news.title:
Vedanta challenges Adani's approved Rs 14,535 cr bid for Jaypee, claiming its Rs 17,926 cr offer is superior.
Vedanta alleges arbitrary CoC decision, faults NCLT and NCLAT for ignoring value maximization under IBC.
news.summary:
Vedanta challenges Adani's approved Rs 14,535 cr bid for Jaypee, claiming its Rs 17,926 cr offer is superior.
Vedanta alleges arbitrary CoC decision, faults NCLT and NCLAT for ignoring value maximization under IBC.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd announced the completion of Mr. Dindayal Jalan's tenure as Non-Executive Independent Director and appointment of Mr. S.V. Murali Dhar Rao as his replacement.
Vedanta's board approved extending the timeline for conditions precedent under its Composite Scheme of Arrangement to June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd announced the completion of Mr. Dindayal Jalan's tenure as Non-Executive Independent Director and appointment of Mr. S.V. Murali Dhar Rao as his replacement.
Vedanta's board approved extending the timeline for conditions precedent under its Composite Scheme of Arrangement to June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Anil Agarwal challenges Gautam Adani's $4B winning bid for real estate assets.
The contested assets include India's only Formula One track, adding to the dispute.
news.summary:
Anil Agarwal challenges Gautam Adani's $4B winning bid for real estate assets.
The contested assets include India's only Formula One track, adding to the dispute.

news.title:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.
news.summary:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.

news.title:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.
news.summary:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.

news.title: Vedanta clarifies reports regarding a $5B investment in the US.
news.summary: Vedanta clarifies reports regarding a $5B investment in the US.

news.title:
Vedanta challenges NCLAT order on Adani resolution plan in Supreme Court.
Vedanta claims its November bid was higher than Adani's; NCLAT allowed plan to proceed.
news.summary:
Vedanta challenges NCLAT order on Adani resolution plan in Supreme Court.

news.title: Vedanta challenges NCLAT order in court to keep Adani plan on hold.
news.summary: Vedanta challenges NCLAT order in court to keep Adani plan on hold.

news.title:
Nifty Metal rose 1.4%, led by Nalco (+6.1%), Hindalco (+4.3%), and Vedanta (+3.7%).
Global aluminium prices surged due to Middle East tensions; Indian producers may benefit temporarily.
news.summary:
Nifty Metal rose 1.4%, led by Nalco (+6.1%), Hindalco (+4.3%), and Vedanta (+3.7%).
Global aluminium prices surged due to Middle East tensions; Indian producers may benefit temporarily.

news.title:
Vedanta plans to split into five listed companies by April 2026 under a restructuring program.
The demerger aims to simplify operations, enhance financial stability, and unlock shareholder value.
news.summary:
Vedanta plans to split into five listed companies by April 2026 under a restructuring program.
The demerger aims to simplify operations, enhance financial stability, and unlock shareholder value.

news.title:
Kotak Securities' Amol Athawale recommends Vedanta, Crompton Greaves, and Canara Bank for short-term gains with specific targets and stop losses.
Vedanta targets ₹720, Crompton ₹260, and Canara Bank ₹147, supported by technical patterns and bullish momentum signals.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities' Amol Athawale recommends Vedanta, Crompton Greaves, and Canara Bank for short-term gains with specific targets and stop losses.
Vedanta targets ₹720, Crompton ₹260, and Canara Bank ₹147, supported by technical patterns and bullish momentum signals.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates' insolvency raises questions on commercial wisdom under IBC 2016.
The case highlights the judicial review limits in India's corporate insolvency processes.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates' insolvency raises questions on commercial wisdom under IBC 2016.
The case highlights the judicial review limits in India's corporate insolvency processes.

news.title:
Vedanta shares drop 3% after turning ex-date for Rs 11 interim dividend.
The stock was among the top losers in the metals pack on Friday.
news.summary:
Vedanta shares drop 3% after turning ex-date for Rs 11 interim dividend.
The stock was among the top losers in the metals pack on Friday.

news.title:
NCLAT allows Adani Enterprises' ₹14,543-cr resolution plan for JAL to proceed while seeking CoC responses.
Vedanta challenges NCLT approval of Adani's plan, citing unfairness; Adani's bid secures 93.8% creditor voting.
news.summary:
NCLAT allows Adani Enterprises' ₹14,543-cr resolution plan for JAL to proceed while seeking CoC responses.
Vedanta challenges NCLT approval of Adani's plan, citing unfairness; Adani's bid secures 93.8% creditor voting.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd. executed a NSE block trade of ~502,534 shares at Rs. 642.8.
The trade totaled Rs. 32.3 crore, indicating notable market activity for Vedanta.

news.title:
Vedanta shares drop over 5% on March 23 ahead of its board meeting to discuss a third interim dividend.
Vedanta appeals NCLT decision favoring Adani's ₹14,535 cr bid for Jaiprakash Associates; hearing set before NCLAT.
news.summary:
Vedanta shares drop over 5% on March 23 ahead of its board meeting to discuss a third interim dividend.
